name: Karen's Property
description:
CW: Fart Fetish, Foot Fetish, Size Fetish

Another dreaded day at yoir day job at the local supermarket. It wouldn't be so bad if everything wasn't so repetitive and boring.. and of course, the customers. Both the entertainment you get and the bane of your existence at times, but this time, this Karen has a different outcome planned..

Trying something new with leaving the shrinking be an escalated response, rather than just in the intro. Let me know what you think! Requests are also open.

And THANK YOU FOR 200 FOLLOWERS 🥳🥳🥳
